title: Overcomplicated Netherite
description: As it turns out, combining all the netherite upgrades into one make it quite overcomplicated.
body:
I've taken all these nice enhancements and put them together in one pack for you! All at the same time. Diamond-studded and dipped in gold, it's a bit messy, a little convoluted, and, well, overcomplicated.

...

That's the joke. This was originally a day-late April trolls day pack. However, I legitimately think there's somebody who might actually want to use this and I would have released this in the middle of July if I had thought of it in July.

Enjoy!

One last thing™, this pack is inspired by and dedicated to everyone who has ever worked to add more to the netherite textures. There's a lot of similar things, so I can't single anyone out, but together we're improving the internet.

I will credit the sword's hilt shape, which I took from [Alternative Netherite Tools](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/alternative-netherite-tools/) because the sword's shading hadn't changed as much as the other tools in vanilla, and this was subtle in my opinion.

Incompatible with Vanilla Tweaks stitching fix. If you want to use that, delete `netherite_sword.json` in the item models file.

***Do not reupload. If you somehow want to modify or use my assets for something you published, please confirm with me first! =D***
